mapper.select:
select id, name, logo, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, del_flag, remark from `spzx-product`.brand
del_flag = 0
and name like "%"#{name}"%"
select id, name, logo, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, del_flag, remark from `spzx-product`.brand where del_flag = 0
